title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zoho Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Zoho Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation:
Zoho Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation!
